author: doll-agent
content:
Add ferray-ufunc/src/errstate.rs implementing numpy's errstate/seterr API: per-thread policy mapping (Ignore/Warn/Raise) for each FpErrorClass (DivideByZero/Overflow/Underflow/Invalid). Public API: seterr/geterr, with_errstate (RAII scope guard), record_fp_event (kernels call this when they detect an event), take_fp_events (drain Warn-recorded events), check_fp_errors (return Err for queued Raise events).

Module docstring is honest about the fact that ufunc kernels don't yet call record_fp_event - that's the per-kernel integration as follow-up. The state-management infrastructure is the deliverable here.

7 tests covering defaults, seterr/geterr, Warn/Ignore/Raise dispatch, scoped overrides, and panic-safe restoration on Drop.
